source: BTD Mod Helper game data export

1.description: Flies a deadly little drone around to shoot at the Bloons.

2.description: Etienne's range increased and Monkeys in radius get 10% more range.

3.description: Drone Swarm: Etienne launches 4 more temporary drones to wreak some Bloon popping havoc.

5.description: Drone increased attack speed and infrared camera allows shooting of Camo Bloons.

7.description: Etienne now controls 2 drones at once.

8.description: UAV: all Monkeys gain Camo Bloon detection.

9.description: Drones pop an extra Bloon layer.

10.description: UCAV: high altitude surveillance drone becomes devastating combat drone for a short time.

11.description: Etienne gains a third drone to control.

12.description: Drone upgrades! Increased popping power and flight speed.

15.description: UCAV damage output and duration greatly increased.

16.description: Etienne's range, drone popping power, and Drone Swarm cooldown all improved. Monkeys in radius get 20% more range.

17.description: UCAV damage output greatly increased again!

19.description: Etienne now controls four drones all the time!

20.description: Perma-UCAV: Surveillance drone becomes permanent UCAV. When activated becomes more powerful for a short time and can pop all Bloon types.
